sections.description: Publishes the operator's Our commitment to player protection page, fulfilling the UK Voluntary Code of Good Practice for Prize Draw Operators clause 3.4 (Public Disclosure). Auto-creates an editable page listing measures across Player Protections, Transparency and Accountability, complete with an adherence statement, a GOV.UK link, and a sitewide footer badge. Content is admin-editable via ACF under Theme Settings → Nera Features.
sections.installation: Install and activate the plugin. An Our commitment to player protection page is created automatically. Edit the page content and footer badge text under Theme Settings → Nera Features.
